ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fitness_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant attending the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "sweep_scull" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if sweep sculling was included in the session */,
  "heavy_light" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the session was heavy or light intensity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Calories burned during the session */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer conducting the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitness_sessions_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric recording */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the metrics are associated with */,
  "rib_bmd" REAL /* Bone mineral density of the rib */,
  "spine_bmd" REAL /* Bone mineral density of the spine */,
  "hip_bmd" REAL /* Bone mineral density of the hip */,
  "body_fat" REAL /* Body fat percentage of the participant */,
  "skeletal_muscle_mass" REAL /* Skeletal muscle mass */,
  "visceral_fat" REAL /* Visceral fat level */,
  "water_percentage" REAL /* Body water percentage */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the feedback entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session for which feedback was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (1 to 5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant regarding the session */,
  "trainer_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the trainer */,
  "session_effectiveness" INTEGER /* Trainer's assessment of session effectiveness (1 to 5 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES fitness_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "intensity_level" TEXT /* Intensity level of the program (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in weeks */,
  "program_cost" REAL /* Cost of the program */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer leading the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the enrollment record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant enrolled in the program */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment in the program */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the program completion */,
  "dropout_reason" TEXT /* Reason for dropping out (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrition_info" (
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for nutrition data */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "calories" REAL /* Total calories consumed */,
  "protein" REAL /* Total protein intake */,
  "carbohydrates" REAL /* Total carbohydrates intake */,
  "fats" REAL /* Total fats intake */,
  "fiber" REAL /* Total fiber intake */,
  "sugar" REAL /* Total sugar intake */,
  "meal_time" TEXT /* Time of the meal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_tracking" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the progress record */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the participant at the time of record */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes for additional context on the progress made */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index */,
  "body_composition" TEXT /* Summary of body composition changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness goal */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant setting the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of fitness goal (e.g., weight loss, muscle gain) */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the goal */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline by which the goal should be achieved */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value towards the goal */,
  "progress_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of progress towards the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "study_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study participant record */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant involved in the study */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date the participant joined the study */,
  "role_in_study" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the study */,
  "data_consent" INTEGER /* Consent for data usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trainer, researcher) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
